parameters.content:
## README
- Owner: Richard Berenczei / richard.berenczei@pwc.com
- Dependencies: BIG Postgres credential, n8n.exposes table, BIG - Expose Location Enrichment, BIG - Expose Persistence, BIG - Expose Error Handler sub-workflows
- Logic Summary: Normalize intake, hash the PDF, optionally check for duplicates, extract text, run deterministic and AI extraction, enrich location, validate, optionally persist.

## Input Contract
Called via `executeWorkflow` from any Intake workflow. Expected fields on the input item:
```
{ source_filename, ingestion_channel, received_date, duplicate_mode, persist_result, persistence_mode }
```
With binary key `pdf` containing the PDF file.

## Output Contract
Returns the full extraction payload with `processing_metadata.status` set to one of:
- `success` — all business-critical fields populated and valid
- `partial_success` — valid extraction but location enrichment failed
- `validation_failed` — one or more business-critical fields missing or invalid
- `non_expose` — document classified as non-exposé (NDA, AGB, floor plan, etc.)
- `duplicate_skipped` — hash matched an existing record and duplicate_mode=skip

## Sections
1. Input & Idempotency — normalize intake, hash PDF, init context, duplicate lookup
2. Deterministic Extraction — regex/heuristic parse of PDF text
3. AI Normalization — OpenAI structured output to fill gaps
4. Enrichment, Validation & Persistence — location APIs, schema validation, Postgres insert

## Input & Idempotency
Receive intake payload, normalize binary key to 'pdf', hash the PDF, initialize the canonical extraction context, and optionally check Postgres for a duplicate by hash.

## Deterministic Extraction
Extract raw text from the PDF binary, then apply regex and heuristic rules to populate as many fields as possible before calling the AI.

## AI Normalization
Build a structured-output OpenAI request using the deterministic candidate as context, then merge the AI output back, preferring deterministic values when available.

## Enrichment, Validation & Persistence
Run location enrichment sub-workflow, finalize validation status and map_url, then conditionally persist to Postgres.
